economic_notes: First Nation holds 33.33% interest in Wahkohtowin Development Limited Partnership (WDLP) and Three Nations Development LP (TNDLP), both engaged in community economic development. Share of earnings from business enterprises was $1,305,805 in 2020 vs $35,409 in 2019. COVID-19 declared pandemic March 11, 2020 with unknown financial impact. Borden Gold (Newmont) is an impact benefit agreement partner.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2020 (not 2024). Entities WDLP, WDGP, TNDLP, and 2454357 Ontario Inc. are accounted for under the modified equity method (not fully consolidated). Net financial debt position of -$1,681,156. Advances from Land Claim Trust of $2,012,191 are non-interest bearing with repayment tied to impact benefit agreement receipts. No schedule of remuneration disclosed. Restricted cash of $92,466 is CMHC replacement reserve. Accumulated surplus note shows minor discrepancy ($8,802,947 vs $8,802,687 on face of statements). COVID-19 note included as it was declared just before year-end.
